name.zh: Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证

description.zh: Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证聚焦以下边界：仅对合成服务账号的单个 SPN 核对票据加密类型、密码策略和离线审计边界。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation focuses on this boundary: Reviews ticket encryption, password policy, and offline audit boundaries for one synthetic service account and one SPN. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 凭据风险来自秘密材料、备份权限、缓存、票据或密钥保护边界过宽。有效验证必须区分“对象存在或可列出”与“秘密可被未授权主体读取或使用”，不能把管理员工具成功运行直接等同于漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Credential risk arises when secret material, backup privileges, caches, tickets, or key-protection boundaries are overly broad. A valid validation distinguishes object visibility from unauthorized secret access or use; successful execution of an administrative tool is not itself a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 使用合成账号、离线夹具或只读 ACL 查询建立正常基线，再运行一个 PAYLOADER_CREDENTIAL 标记检查。只保存路径、类型、所有者、权限和事件 ID，不保存口令、哈希、票据、主密钥或明文内容；阳性必须由权限与访问日志共同支持。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use a synthetic account, offline fixture, or read-only ACL query to establish a baseline and then run one PAYLOADER_CREDENTIAL marker check. Retain only paths, types, owners, permissions, and event IDs, never passwords, hashes, tickets, master keys, or plaintext; a positive result requires both permissions and access logs. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理、最小权限、Credential Guard 或等效保护、强服务账号密码与现代 Kerberos 加密，限制备份/调试/复制权限并轮换暴露秘密。对 hive、LSASS、票据、SYSVOL 和凭据 API 访问建立告警，使用合成夹具回归。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration, least privilege, Credential Guard or equivalent protection, strong service-account passwords, and modern Kerberos encryption. Restrict backup, debug, and replication rights, rotate exposed secrets, alert on hive, LSASS, ticket, SYSVOL, and credential-API access, and regress with synthetic fixtures.

title.zh: 确认 Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation

description.zh: 记录 Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: Kerberoasting 单账号暴露验证只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Kerberoasting Single-Account Exposure Validation is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 仅对合成服务账号的单个 SPN 核对票据加密类型、密码策略和离线审计边界。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

title.en: Remediate the NTDS.dit Backup and Access-Boundary Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: NTDS.dit 备份与访问边界审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: NTDS.dit Backup and Access-Boundary Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对域控制器数据库、卷影副本、IFM 与复制权限边界，不复制数据库或提取域凭据。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计

description.zh: GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Legacy GPP cpassword Configuration Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Legacy GPP cpassword Configuration Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计聚焦以下边界：在固定 SYSVOL 测试目录检测遗留 cpassword 字段与权限，不递归全域或解密真实凭据。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Legacy GPP cpassword Configuration Audit focuses on this boundary: Detects legacy cpassword fields and permissions in a fixed SYSVOL test path without recursively scanning a domain or decrypting real credentials. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 凭据风险来自秘密材料、备份权限、缓存、票据或密钥保护边界过宽。有效验证必须区分“对象存在或可列出”与“秘密可被未授权主体读取或使用”，不能把管理员工具成功运行直接等同于漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Credential risk arises when secret material, backup privileges, caches, tickets, or key-protection boundaries are overly broad. A valid validation distinguishes object visibility from unauthorized secret access or use; successful execution of an administrative tool is not itself a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 使用合成账号、离线夹具或只读 ACL 查询建立正常基线，再运行一个 PAYLOADER_CREDENTIAL 标记检查。只保存路径、类型、所有者、权限和事件 ID，不保存口令、哈希、票据、主密钥或明文内容；阳性必须由权限与访问日志共同支持。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use a synthetic account, offline fixture, or read-only ACL query to establish a baseline and then run one PAYLOADER_CREDENTIAL marker check. Retain only paths, types, owners, permissions, and event IDs, never passwords, hashes, tickets, master keys, or plaintext; a positive result requires both permissions and access logs. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理、最小权限、Credential Guard 或等效保护、强服务账号密码与现代 Kerberos 加密，限制备份/调试/复制权限并轮换暴露秘密。对 hive、LSASS、票据、SYSVOL 和凭据 API 访问建立告警，使用合成夹具回归。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration, least privilege, Credential Guard or equivalent protection, strong service-account passwords, and modern Kerberos encryption. Restrict backup, debug, and replication rights, rotate exposed secrets, alert on hive, LSASS, ticket, SYSVOL, and credential-API access, and regress with synthetic fixtures.

title.zh: 确认 GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Legacy GPP cpassword Configuration Audit

description.zh: 记录 GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Legacy GPP cpassword Configuration Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Legacy GPP cpassword Configuration Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Legacy GPP cpassword Configuration Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 GPP cpassword 遗留配置审计 边界并回归

title.zh: 确认 RDP 配置与凭据引用审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for RDP Configuration and Credential-Reference Audit

description.zh: 记录 RDP 配置与凭据引用审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for RDP Configuration and Credential-Reference Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 RDP 配置与凭据引用审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed RDP Configuration and Credential-Reference Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 RDP 配置与凭据引用审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for RDP Configuration and Credential-Reference Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 RDP 配置与凭据引用审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the RDP Configuration and Credential-Reference Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: RDP 配置与凭据引用审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: RDP Configuration and Credential-Reference Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 在合成配置目录检查 RDP 文件与凭据引用，不枚举系统凭据管理器内容或解密 DPAPI。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: Wi-Fi 配置元数据审计

description.zh: Wi-Fi 配置元数据审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Wi-Fi Profile Metadata Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: Wi-Fi 配置元数据审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Wi-Fi 配置元数据审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Wi-Fi Profile Metadata Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Wi-Fi 配置元数据审计聚焦以下边界：只列出实验无线配置名称与认证类型，不使用 key=clear 或记录预共享密钥。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Wi-Fi Profile Metadata Audit focuses on this boundary: Lists only lab wireless profile names and authentication types without using key=clear or recording pre-shared keys. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 凭据风险来自秘密材料、备份权限、缓存、票据或密钥保护边界过宽。有效验证必须区分“对象存在或可列出”与“秘密可被未授权主体读取或使用”，不能把管理员工具成功运行直接等同于漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Credential risk arises when secret material, backup privileges, caches, tickets, or key-protection boundaries are overly broad. A valid validation distinguishes object visibility from unauthorized secret access or use; successful execution of an administrative tool is not itself a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 使用合成账号、离线夹具或只读 ACL 查询建立正常基线，再运行一个 PAYLOADER_CREDENTIAL 标记检查。只保存路径、类型、所有者、权限和事件 ID，不保存口令、哈希、票据、主密钥或明文内容；阳性必须由权限与访问日志共同支持。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use a synthetic account, offline fixture, or read-only ACL query to establish a baseline and then run one PAYLOADER_CREDENTIAL marker check. Retain only paths, types, owners, permissions, and event IDs, never passwords, hashes, tickets, master keys, or plaintext; a positive result requires both permissions and access logs. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理、最小权限、Credential Guard 或等效保护、强服务账号密码与现代 Kerberos 加密，限制备份/调试/复制权限并轮换暴露秘密。对 hive、LSASS、票据、SYSVOL 和凭据 API 访问建立告警，使用合成夹具回归。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration, least privilege, Credential Guard or equivalent protection, strong service-account passwords, and modern Kerberos encryption. Restrict backup, debug, and replication rights, rotate exposed secrets, alert on hive, LSASS, ticket, SYSVOL, and credential-API access, and regress with synthetic fixtures.

title.zh: 确认 Wi-Fi 配置元数据审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Wi-Fi Profile Metadata Audit

description.zh: 记录 Wi-Fi 配置元数据审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Wi-Fi Profile Metadata Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

vulnerability.en: Credential risk arises when secret material, backup privileges, caches, tickets, or key-protection boundaries are overly broad. A valid validation distinguishes object visibility from unauthorized secret access or use; successful execution of an administrative tool is not itself a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 使用合成账号、离线夹具或只读 ACL 查询建立正常基线，再运行一个 PAYLOADER_CREDENTIAL 标记检查。只保存路径、类型、所有者、权限和事件 ID，不保存口令、哈希、票据、主密钥或明文内容；阳性必须由权限与访问日志共同支持。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use a synthetic account, offline fixture, or read-only ACL query to establish a baseline and then run one PAYLOADER_CREDENTIAL marker check. Retain only paths, types, owners, permissions, and event IDs, never passwords, hashes, tickets, master keys, or plaintext; a positive result requires both permissions and access logs. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理、最小权限、Credential Guard 或等效保护、强服务账号密码与现代 Kerberos 加密，限制备份/调试/复制权限并轮换暴露秘密。对 hive、LSASS、票据、SYSVOL 和凭据 API 访问建立告警，使用合成夹具回归。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration, least privilege, Credential Guard or equivalent protection, strong service-account passwords, and modern Kerberos encryption. Restrict backup, debug, and replication rights, rotate exposed secrets, alert on hive, LSASS, ticket, SYSVOL, and credential-API access, and regress with synthetic fixtures.

title.zh: 确认 KeePass 文件与进程保护审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for KeePass File and Process Protection Audit

description.zh: 记录 KeePass 文件与进程保护审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for KeePass File and Process Protection Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 KeePass 文件与进程保护审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed KeePass File and Process Protection Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 KeePass 文件与进程保护审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for KeePass File and Process Protection Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 KeePass 文件与进程保护审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the KeePass File and Process Protection Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: KeePass 文件与进程保护审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: KeePass File and Process Protection Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 在固定实验目录检查 KDBX 权限、应用版本与进程保护，不扫描全盘或提取主密码。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: LSA Secrets 存储边界审计

description.zh: LSA Secrets 存储边界审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: LSA Secrets Storage-Boundary Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: LSA Secrets 存储边界审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 LSA Secrets 存储边界审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for LSA Secrets Storage-Boundary Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: LSA Secrets 存储边界审计聚焦以下边界：核对 SECURITY/SYSTEM hive ACL、备份权限和访问日志，不保存 hive 或导出秘密。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: LSA Secrets Storage-Boundary Audit focuses on this boundary: Reviews SECURITY and SYSTEM hive ACLs, backup privileges, and access logs without saving hives or exporting secrets. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 凭据风险来自秘密材料、备份权限、缓存、票据或密钥保护边界过宽。有效验证必须区分“对象存在或可列出”与“秘密可被未授权主体读取或使用”，不能把管理员工具成功运行直接等同于漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Credential risk arises when secret material, backup privileges, caches, tickets, or key-protection boundaries are overly broad. A valid validation distinguishes object visibility from unauthorized secret access or use; successful execution of an administrative tool is not itself a vulnerability.

Retain only paths, types, owners, permissions, and event IDs, never passwords, hashes, tickets, master keys, or plaintext; a positive result requires both permissions and access logs. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理、最小权限、Credential Guard 或等效保护、强服务账号密码与现代 Kerberos 加密，限制备份/调试/复制权限并轮换暴露秘密。对 hive、LSASS、票据、SYSVOL 和凭据 API 访问建立告警，使用合成夹具回归。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration, least privilege, Credential Guard or equivalent protection, strong service-account passwords, and modern Kerberos encryption. Restrict backup, debug, and replication rights, rotate exposed secrets, alert on hive, LSASS, ticket, SYSVOL, and credential-API access, and regress with synthetic fixtures.

name.zh: PsExec/SMB 远程服务边界验证
name.en: PsExec and SMB Remote-Service Boundary Validation

description.zh: PsExec/SMB 远程服务边界验证保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: PsExec and SMB Remote-Service Boundary Validation preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: PsExec/SMB 远程服务边界验证
subCategory.en: PsExec and SMB Remote-Service Boundary Validation

prerequisites.zh: 确认 PsExec/SMB 远程服务边界验证 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for PsExec and SMB Remote-Service Boundary Validation are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: PsExec/SMB 远程服务边界验证聚焦以下边界：只验证实验主机 445 端口、服务控制管理器 ACL 与日志，不创建服务或执行远程命令。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: PsExec and SMB Remote-Service Boundary Validation focuses on this boundary: Validates only port 445, Service Control Manager ACLs, and logs on a lab host without creating a service or executing a remote command. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 横向风险来自远程管理协议、认证材料、服务控制、计划任务或会话权限超出分层管理边界。端口开放或管理协议可用只说明能力存在，只有未授权主体可执行远程动作并有目标端日志证明时才构成越权。
vulnerability.en: Lateral risk arises when remote-management protocols, authentication material, service control, scheduled tasks, or session permissions exceed the tiered administration boundary. An open port or available protocol shows capability only; unauthorized remote action plus target-side logs is required to prove an authorization failure.

exploitation.zh: 只对一台隔离实验主机运行 PAYLOADER_LATERAL 可达性、ACL 或事件查询，不传入真实口令、哈希、票据或远程命令。关联源主机、目标主机、防火墙和身份日志，确认协议、账号和授权范围；不创建服务、任务、进程或会话。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run only a PAYLOADER_LATERAL reachability, ACL, or event query against one isolated lab host without real passwords, hashes, tickets, or remote commands. Correlate source, target, firewall, and identity logs to confirm protocol, account, and authorization scope; do not create services, tasks, processes, or sessions. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 限制远程管理到专用管理网与跳板机，实施主机防火墙、SMB/LDAP 签名、EPA、强认证和分层管理员账号，禁用不需要的 WMI/DCOM/RDP/WinRM。监控远程服务、任务、会话和异常 NTLM/Kerberos 使用。
mitigation.en: Restrict remote management to dedicated management networks and jump hosts; enforce host firewalls, SMB and LDAP signing, EPA, strong authentication, and tiered administrator accounts; disable unneeded WMI, DCOM, RDP, and WinRM; and monitor remote services, tasks, sessions, and anomalous NTLM or Kerberos use.

Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: WMI 远程管理授权验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 WMI 远程管理授权验证 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for WMI Remote-Management Authorization Validation are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: WMI 远程管理授权验证聚焦以下边界：核对实验主机 WMI/DCOM 可达性、命名空间 ACL 与事件日志，不调用 Win32_Process.Create。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: WMI Remote-Management Authorization Validation focuses on this boundary: Reviews WMI and DCOM reachability, namespace ACLs, and event logs on a lab host without invoking Win32_Process.Create. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 横向风险来自远程管理协议、认证材料、服务控制、计划任务或会话权限超出分层管理边界。端口开放或管理协议可用只说明能力存在，只有未授权主体可执行远程动作并有目标端日志证明时才构成越权。
vulnerability.en: Lateral risk arises when remote-management protocols, authentication material, service control, scheduled tasks, or session permissions exceed the tiered administration boundary. An open port or available protocol shows capability only; unauthorized remote action plus target-side logs is required to prove an authorization failure.

exploitation.zh: 只对一台隔离实验主机运行 PAYLOADER_LATERAL 可达性、ACL 或事件查询，不传入真实口令、哈希、票据或远程命令。关联源主机、目标主机、防火墙和身份日志，确认协议、账号和授权范围；不创建服务、任务、进程或会话。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run only a PAYLOADER_LATERAL reachability, ACL, or event query against one isolated lab host without real passwords, hashes, tickets, or remote commands. Correlate source, target, firewall, and identity logs to confirm protocol, account, and authorization scope; do not create services, tasks, processes, or sessions. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 限制远程管理到专用管理网与跳板机，实施主机防火墙、SMB/LDAP 签名、EPA、强认证和分层管理员账号，禁用不需要的 WMI/DCOM/RDP/WinRM。监控远程服务、任务、会话和异常 NTLM/Kerberos 使用。
mitigation.en: Restrict remote management to dedicated management networks and jump hosts; enforce host firewalls, SMB and LDAP signing, EPA, strong authentication, and tiered administrator accounts; disable unneeded WMI, DCOM, RDP, and WinRM; and monitor remote services, tasks, sessions, and anomalous NTLM or Kerberos use.

title.zh: 确认 WMI 远程管理授权验证 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for WMI Remote-Management Authorization Validation

description.zh: 记录 WMI 远程管理授权验证 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for WMI Remote-Management Authorization Validation and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 WMI 远程管理授权验证 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed WMI Remote-Management Authorization Validation Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 WMI 远程管理授权验证 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for WMI Remote-Management Authorization Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 WMI 远程管理授权验证 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the WMI Remote-Management Authorization Validation Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: WMI 远程管理授权验证只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: WMI Remote-Management Authorization Validation is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对实验主机 WMI/DCOM 可达性、命名空间 ACL 与事件日志，不调用 Win32_Process.Create。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: NTLM Hash 登录防护验证

description.zh: NTLM Hash 登录防护验证保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: NTLM Hash Logon Protection Validation preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: NTLM Hash 登录防护验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 NTLM Hash 登录防护验证 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。

overview.en: NTLM Hash Logon Protection Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses synthetic authentication logs and a dedicated account to review NTLM restrictions, administrator isolation, and remote UAC without injecting or using a real hash. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对 SMB/LDAP 签名、EPA、通道绑定与实验抓包，不监听生产网段或中继认证。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: DCOM 远程激活授权验证

description.zh: DCOM 远程激活授权验证保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: DCOM 远程激活授权验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 DCOM 远程激活授权验证 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: DCOM 远程激活授权验证聚焦以下边界：只读取实验主机 DCOM 激活权限、CLSID 注册和日志，不调用 ShellExecute 或远程 COM 方法。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation focuses on this boundary: Reads DCOM activation permissions, CLSID registration, and logs on a lab host without calling ShellExecute or remote COM methods. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 横向风险来自远程管理协议、认证材料、服务控制、计划任务或会话权限超出分层管理边界。端口开放或管理协议可用只说明能力存在，只有未授权主体可执行远程动作并有目标端日志证明时才构成越权。
vulnerability.en: Lateral risk arises when remote-management protocols, authentication material, service control, scheduled tasks, or session permissions exceed the tiered administration boundary. An open port or available protocol shows capability only; unauthorized remote action plus target-side logs is required to prove an authorization failure.

exploitation.zh: 只对一台隔离实验主机运行 PAYLOADER_LATERAL 可达性、ACL 或事件查询，不传入真实口令、哈希、票据或远程命令。关联源主机、目标主机、防火墙和身份日志，确认协议、账号和授权范围；不创建服务、任务、进程或会话。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run only a PAYLOADER_LATERAL reachability, ACL, or event query against one isolated lab host without real passwords, hashes, tickets, or remote commands. Correlate source, target, firewall, and identity logs to confirm protocol, account, and authorization scope; do not create services, tasks, processes, or sessions. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 限制远程管理到专用管理网与跳板机，实施主机防火墙、SMB/LDAP 签名、EPA、强认证和分层管理员账号，禁用不需要的 WMI/DCOM/RDP/WinRM。监控远程服务、任务、会话和异常 NTLM/Kerberos 使用。
mitigation.en: Restrict remote management to dedicated management networks and jump hosts; enforce host firewalls, SMB and LDAP signing, EPA, strong authentication, and tiered administrator accounts; disable unneeded WMI, DCOM, RDP, and WinRM; and monitor remote services, tasks, sessions, and anomalous NTLM or Kerberos use.

title.zh: 确认 DCOM 远程激活授权验证 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation

description.zh: 记录 DCOM 远程激活授权验证 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 DCOM 远程激活授权验证 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 DCOM 远程激活授权验证 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 DCOM 远程激活授权验证 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: DCOM 远程激活授权验证只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: DCOM Remote-Activation Authorization Validation is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 只读取实验主机 DCOM 激活权限、CLSID 注册和日志，不调用 ShellExecute 或远程 COM 方法。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

title.zh: 运行一条 NTLM 到 Kerberos 票据边界审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed NTLM-to-Kerberos Ticket-Boundary Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 NTLM 到 Kerberos 票据边界审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for NTLM-to-Kerberos Ticket-Boundary Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 NTLM 到 Kerberos 票据边界审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the NTLM-to-Kerberos Ticket-Boundary Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: NTLM 到 Kerberos 票据边界审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: NTLM-to-Kerberos Ticket-Boundary Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 使用合成票据元数据核对加密类型、日志与身份绑定，不注入哈希或请求真实 TGT。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: Kerberos 票据导入防护审计

description.zh: Kerberos 票据导入防护审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Kerberos Ticket-Import Protection Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: Kerberos 票据导入防护审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Kerberos 票据导入防护审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Kerberos Ticket-Import Protection Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Kerberos 票据导入防护审计聚焦以下边界：使用离线合成 kirbi 元数据核对票据主体、服务与时效，不把票据导入登录会话。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Kerberos Ticket-Import Protection Audit focuses on this boundary: Uses offline synthetic kirbi metadata to review principal, service, and lifetime without importing a ticket into a logon session. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 横向风险来自远程管理协议、认证材料、服务控制、计划任务或会话权限超出分层管理边界。端口开放或管理协议可用只说明能力存在，只有未授权主体可执行远程动作并有目标端日志证明时才构成越权。
vulnerability.en: Lateral risk arises when remote-management protocols, authentication material, service control, scheduled tasks, or session permissions exceed the tiered administration boundary. An open port or available protocol shows capability only; unauthorized remote action plus target-side logs is required to prove an authorization failure.

exploitation.zh: 只对一台隔离实验主机运行 PAYLOADER_LATERAL 可达性、ACL 或事件查询，不传入真实口令、哈希、票据或远程命令。关联源主机、目标主机、防火墙和身份日志，确认协议、账号和授权范围；不创建服务、任务、进程或会话。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run only a PAYLOADER_LATERAL reachability, ACL, or event query against one isolated lab host without real passwords, hashes, tickets, or remote commands. Correlate source, target, firewall, and identity logs to confirm protocol, account, and authorization scope; do not create services, tasks, processes, or sessions. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 限制远程管理到专用管理网与跳板机，实施主机防火墙、SMB/LDAP 签名、EPA、强认证和分层管理员账号，禁用不需要的 WMI/DCOM/RDP/WinRM。监控远程服务、任务、会话和异常 NTLM/Kerberos 使用。
mitigation.en: Restrict remote management to dedicated management networks and jump hosts; enforce host firewalls, SMB and LDAP signing, EPA, strong authentication, and tiered administrator accounts; disable unneeded WMI, DCOM, RDP, and WinRM; and monitor remote services, tasks, sessions, and anomalous NTLM or Kerberos use.

title.zh: 确认 Kerberos 票据导入防护审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Kerberos Ticket-Import Protection Audit

description.zh: 记录 Kerberos 票据导入防护审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Kerberos Ticket-Import Protection Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

vulnerability.en: Lateral risk arises when remote-management protocols, authentication material, service control, scheduled tasks, or session permissions exceed the tiered administration boundary. An open port or available protocol shows capability only; unauthorized remote action plus target-side logs is required to prove an authorization failure.

exploitation.zh: 只对一台隔离实验主机运行 PAYLOADER_LATERAL 可达性、ACL 或事件查询，不传入真实口令、哈希、票据或远程命令。关联源主机、目标主机、防火墙和身份日志，确认协议、账号和授权范围；不创建服务、任务、进程或会话。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run only a PAYLOADER_LATERAL reachability, ACL, or event query against one isolated lab host without real passwords, hashes, tickets, or remote commands. Correlate source, target, firewall, and identity logs to confirm protocol, account, and authorization scope; do not create services, tasks, processes, or sessions. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 限制远程管理到专用管理网与跳板机，实施主机防火墙、SMB/LDAP 签名、EPA、强认证和分层管理员账号，禁用不需要的 WMI/DCOM/RDP/WinRM。监控远程服务、任务、会话和异常 NTLM/Kerberos 使用。
mitigation.en: Restrict remote management to dedicated management networks and jump hosts; enforce host firewalls, SMB and LDAP signing, EPA, strong authentication, and tiered administrator accounts; disable unneeded WMI, DCOM, RDP, and WinRM; and monitor remote services, tasks, sessions, and anomalous NTLM or Kerberos use.

title.zh: 确认 远程计划任务授权验证 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Remote Scheduled-Task Authorization Validation

description.zh: 记录 远程计划任务授权验证 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Remote Scheduled-Task Authorization Validation and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 远程计划任务授权验证 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Remote Scheduled-Task Authorization Validation Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 远程计划任务授权验证 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Remote Scheduled-Task Authorization Validation

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 远程计划任务授权验证 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Remote Scheduled-Task Authorization Validation Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: 远程计划任务授权验证只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Remote Scheduled-Task Authorization Validation is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 只读取实验主机计划任务 ACL 与日志，不创建一次性任务或执行远程命令。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: Excel DCOM 激活与 DDE 防护审计
name.en: Excel DCOM Activation and DDE Protection Audit

description.zh: Excel DCOM 激活与 DDE 防护审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Excel DCOM Activation and DDE Protection Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: Excel DCOM 激活与 DDE 防护审计
subCategory.en: Excel DCOM Activation and DDE Protection Audit

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Excel DCOM 激活与 DDE 防护审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Excel DCOM Activation and DDE Protection Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Excel DCOM 激活与 DDE 防护审计聚焦以下边界：核对 Excel COM 注册、远程激活权限和 DDE 策略，不启动远程 Excel 或子进程。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Excel DCOM Activation and DDE Protection Audit focuses on this boundary: Reviews Excel COM registration, remote-activation permissions, and DDE policy without starting remote Excel or a child process. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

An open port or available protocol shows capability only; unauthorized remote action plus target-side logs is required to prove an authorization failure.

Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 限制远程管理到专用管理网与跳板机，实施主机防火墙、SMB/LDAP 签名、EPA、强认证和分层管理员账号，禁用不需要的 WMI/DCOM/RDP/WinRM。监控远程服务、任务、会话和异常 NTLM/Kerberos 使用。
mitigation.en: Restrict remote management to dedicated management networks and jump hosts; enforce host firewalls, SMB and LDAP signing, EPA, strong authentication, and tiered administrator accounts; disable unneeded WMI, DCOM, RDP, and WinRM; and monitor remote services, tasks, sessions, and anomalous NTLM or Kerberos use.

subCategory.en: RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit

prerequisites.zh: 确认 RDP 与 NTLM Relay 分类审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: RDP 与 NTLM Relay 分类审计聚焦以下边界：纠正原条目把 SMB/LDAP NTLM Relay 误称为 RDP Relay 的问题，并只核对协议签名与日志。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit focuses on this boundary: Corrects the original conflation of SMB or LDAP NTLM Relay with RDP Relay and reviews only protocol signing and logs. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 横向风险来自远程管理协议、认证材料、服务控制、计划任务或会话权限超出分层管理边界。端口开放或管理协议可用只说明能力存在，只有未授权主体可执行远程动作并有目标端日志证明时才构成越权。
vulnerability.en: Lateral risk arises when remote-management protocols, authentication material, service control, scheduled tasks, or session permissions exceed the tiered administration boundary. An open port or available protocol shows capability only; unauthorized remote action plus target-side logs is required to prove an authorization failure.

exploitation.zh: 只对一台隔离实验主机运行 PAYLOADER_LATERAL 可达性、ACL 或事件查询，不传入真实口令、哈希、票据或远程命令。关联源主机、目标主机、防火墙和身份日志，确认协议、账号和授权范围；不创建服务、任务、进程或会话。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run only a PAYLOADER_LATERAL reachability, ACL, or event query against one isolated lab host without real passwords, hashes, tickets, or remote commands. Correlate source, target, firewall, and identity logs to confirm protocol, account, and authorization scope; do not create services, tasks, processes, or sessions. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 限制远程管理到专用管理网与跳板机，实施主机防火墙、SMB/LDAP 签名、EPA、强认证和分层管理员账号，禁用不需要的 WMI/DCOM/RDP/WinRM。监控远程服务、任务、会话和异常 NTLM/Kerberos 使用。
mitigation.en: Restrict remote management to dedicated management networks and jump hosts; enforce host firewalls, SMB and LDAP signing, EPA, strong authentication, and tiered administrator accounts; disable unneeded WMI, DCOM, RDP, and WinRM; and monitor remote services, tasks, sessions, and anomalous NTLM or Kerberos use.

title.zh: 确认 RDP 与 NTLM Relay 分类审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit

description.zh: 记录 RDP 与 NTLM Relay 分类审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 RDP 与 NTLM Relay 分类审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 RDP 与 NTLM Relay 分类审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 RDP 与 NTLM Relay 分类审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: RDP 与 NTLM Relay 分类审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: RDP and NTLM Relay Classification Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 纠正原条目把 SMB/LDAP NTLM Relay 误称为 RDP Relay 的问题，并只核对协议签名与日志。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: Windows 令牌权限与模拟防护
name.en: Windows Token Privilege and Impersonation Protection

description.zh: Windows 令牌权限与模拟防护保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Windows Token Privilege and Impersonation Protection preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: Windows 令牌权限与模拟防护
subCategory.en: Windows Token Privilege and Impersonation Protection

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Windows 令牌权限与模拟防护 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Windows Token Privilege and Impersonation Protection are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Windows 令牌权限与模拟防护聚焦以下边界：只读取当前令牌、SeImpersonate 等权限和相关事件，不复制、提升或模拟高权限令牌。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Windows Token Privilege and Impersonation Protection focuses on this boundary: Reads the current token, privileges such as SeImpersonate, and related events without duplicating, elevating, or impersonating a privileged token. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 提权风险来自服务、文件、令牌、安装策略、内核或计划执行边界允许低权限主体影响高权限进程。版本匹配、权限存在或工具可运行只是前置条件，必须证明可控对象与高权限执行之间存在实际授权缺口。
vulnerability.en: Privilege-escalation risk arises when services, files, tokens, installer policy, kernel, or scheduled execution let a low-privilege principal influence a high-privilege process. Version match, privilege presence, or tool availability is only a prerequisite; an actual authorization gap between a controllable object and privileged execution must be shown.

exploitation.zh: 在可回滚实验主机使用 PAYLOADER_PRIVESC 只读查询记录版本、补丁、ACL、所有者、服务账户和令牌权限，并与高权限基线对照。不修改服务、注册表、任务、SUID、sudoers 或进程，也不启动高权限 shell。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PRIVESC read-only queries on a reversible lab host to record version, patches, ACLs, owners, service accounts, and token privileges and compare them with a privileged baseline. Do not modify services, registry, tasks, SUID, sudoers, or processes and do not start a privileged shell. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 应用安全补丁，移除不必要的模拟/备份/调试权限，收紧服务和目录 ACL、sudoers、SUID、安装策略与计划任务，使用受保护服务账户和应用控制。监控高权限子进程、配置变更和异常令牌使用，并用同一查询回归。
mitigation.en: Apply security patches, remove unneeded impersonation, backup, and debug privileges, tighten service and directory ACLs, sudoers, SUID, installer policy, and scheduled tasks, and use protected service accounts plus application control. Monitor privileged child processes, configuration changes, and anomalous token use and replay the same queries.

title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Windows Token Privilege and Impersonation Protection

analysis.en: Windows Token Privilege and Impersonation Protection is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 只读取当前令牌、SeImpersonate 等权限和相关事件，不复制、提升或模拟高权限令牌。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: UAC 策略与自动提升边界审计
name.en: UAC Policy and Auto-Elevation Boundary Audit

description.zh: UAC 策略与自动提升边界审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: UAC Policy and Auto-Elevation Boundary Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.en: UAC Policy and Auto-Elevation Boundary Audit

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: UAC 策略与自动提升边界审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: UAC Policy and Auto-Elevation Boundary Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对 UAC 策略、自动提升二进制和相关注册表 ACL，不写入 shell/open/command 键或启动载荷。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计

description.zh: DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: DLL Search-Order and Directory-Permission Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for DLL Search-Order and Directory-Permission Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计聚焦以下边界：使用签名无害 DLL 夹具核对搜索顺序、缺失模块和可写目录，不生成反向连接 DLL。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: DLL Search-Order and Directory-Permission Audit focuses on this boundary: Uses a signed harmless DLL fixture to review search order, missing modules, and writable directories without generating a callback DLL. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 提权风险来自服务、文件、令牌、安装策略、内核或计划执行边界允许低权限主体影响高权限进程。版本匹配、权限存在或工具可运行只是前置条件，必须证明可控对象与高权限执行之间存在实际授权缺口。
vulnerability.en: Privilege-escalation risk arises when services, files, tokens, installer policy, kernel, or scheduled execution let a low-privilege principal influence a high-privilege process. Version match, privilege presence, or tool availability is only a prerequisite; an actual authorization gap between a controllable object and privileged execution must be shown.

exploitation.zh: 在可回滚实验主机使用 PAYLOADER_PRIVESC 只读查询记录版本、补丁、ACL、所有者、服务账户和令牌权限，并与高权限基线对照。不修改服务、注册表、任务、SUID、sudoers 或进程，也不启动高权限 shell。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PRIVESC read-only queries on a reversible lab host to record version, patches, ACLs, owners, service accounts, and token privileges and compare them with a privileged baseline. Do not modify services, registry, tasks, SUID, sudoers, or processes and do not start a privileged shell. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 应用安全补丁，移除不必要的模拟/备份/调试权限，收紧服务和目录 ACL、sudoers、SUID、安装策略与计划任务，使用受保护服务账户和应用控制。监控高权限子进程、配置变更和异常令牌使用，并用同一查询回归。
mitigation.en: Apply security patches, remove unneeded impersonation, backup, and debug privileges, tighten service and directory ACLs, sudoers, SUID, installer policy, and scheduled tasks, and use protected service accounts plus application control. Monitor privileged child processes, configuration changes, and anomalous token use and replay the same queries.

title.zh: 确认 DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for DLL Search-Order and Directory-Permission Audit

description.zh: 记录 DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for DLL Search-Order and Directory-Permission Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed DLL Search-Order and Directory-Permission Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for DLL Search-Order and Directory-Permission Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 DLL 搜索顺序与目录权限审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the DLL Search-Order and Directory-Permission Audit Boundary and Regress

name.zh: Windows 服务 ACL 与路径审计
name.en: Windows Service ACL and Path Audit
