title.zh: 确认 AlwaysInstallElevated 策略审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for AlwaysInstallElevated Policy Audit

description.zh: 记录 AlwaysInstallElevated 策略审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for AlwaysInstallElevated Policy Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 AlwaysInstallElevated 策略审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed AlwaysInstallElevated Policy Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 AlwaysInstallElevated 策略审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for AlwaysInstallElevated Policy Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 AlwaysInstallElevated 策略审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the AlwaysInstallElevated Policy Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: AlwaysInstallElevated 策略审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: AlwaysInstallElevated Policy Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对 HKCU/HKLM 安装策略和 MSI 日志，不生成或安装带执行逻辑的 MSI。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: JuicyPotato 适用条件审计

description.zh: JuicyPotato 适用条件审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: JuicyPotato Prerequisite Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: JuicyPotato 适用条件审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 JuicyPotato 适用条件审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for JuicyPotato Prerequisite Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: JuicyPotato 适用条件审计聚焦以下边界：核对实验系统版本、COM 服务和 SeImpersonate 权限，不启动 SYSTEM 命令。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: JuicyPotato Prerequisite Audit focuses on this boundary: Reviews lab OS version, COM services, and SeImpersonate privilege without launching a SYSTEM command. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 提权风险来自服务、文件、令牌、安装策略、内核或计划执行边界允许低权限主体影响高权限进程。版本匹配、权限存在或工具可运行只是前置条件，必须证明可控对象与高权限执行之间存在实际授权缺口。
vulnerability.en: Privilege-escalation risk arises when services, files, tokens, installer policy, kernel, or scheduled execution let a low-privilege principal influence a high-privilege process. Version match, privilege presence, or tool availability is only a prerequisite; an actual authorization gap between a controllable object and privileged execution must be shown.

exploitation.zh: 在可回滚实验主机使用 PAYLOADER_PRIVESC 只读查询记录版本、补丁、ACL、所有者、服务账户和令牌权限，并与高权限基线对照。不修改服务、注册表、任务、SUID、sudoers 或进程，也不启动高权限 shell。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PRIVESC read-only queries on a reversible lab host to record version, patches, ACLs, owners, service accounts, and token privileges and compare them with a privileged baseline. Do not modify services, registry, tasks, SUID, sudoers, or processes and do not start a privileged shell. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 应用安全补丁，移除不必要的模拟/备份/调试权限，收紧服务和目录 ACL、sudoers、SUID、安装策略与计划任务，使用受保护服务账户和应用控制。监控高权限子进程、配置变更和异常令牌使用，并用同一查询回归。
mitigation.en: Apply security patches, remove unneeded impersonation, backup, and debug privileges, tighten service and directory ACLs, sudoers, SUID, installer policy, and scheduled tasks, and use protected service accounts plus application control. Monitor privileged child processes, configuration changes, and anomalous token use and replay the same queries.

exploitation.zh: 在可回滚实验主机使用 PAYLOADER_PRIVESC 只读查询记录版本、补丁、ACL、所有者、服务账户和令牌权限，并与高权限基线对照。不修改服务、注册表、任务、SUID、sudoers 或进程，也不启动高权限 shell。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PRIVESC read-only queries on a reversible lab host to record version, patches, ACLs, owners, service accounts, and token privileges and compare them with a privileged baseline. Do not modify services, registry, tasks, SUID, sudoers, or processes and do not start a privileged shell. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 应用安全补丁，移除不必要的模拟/备份/调试权限，收紧服务和目录 ACL、sudoers、SUID、安装策略与计划任务，使用受保护服务账户和应用控制。监控高权限子进程、配置变更和异常令牌使用，并用同一查询回归。
mitigation.en: Apply security patches, remove unneeded impersonation, backup, and debug privileges, tighten service and directory ACLs, sudoers, SUID, installer policy, and scheduled tasks, and use protected service accounts plus application control. Monitor privileged child processes, configuration changes, and anomalous token use and replay the same queries.

title.zh: 确认 GodPotato 适用条件审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for GodPotato Prerequisite Audit

description.zh: 记录 GodPotato 适用条件审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for GodPotato Prerequisite Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 GodPotato 适用条件审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed GodPotato Prerequisite Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 GodPotato 适用条件审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for GodPotato Prerequisite Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 GodPotato 适用条件审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the GodPotato Prerequisite Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: GodPotato 适用条件审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: GodPotato Prerequisite Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对 RPC/DCOM 版本、补丁和模拟权限，不执行编码命令或高权限进程。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: SUID 文件权限边界审计

description.zh: SUID 文件权限边界审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: SUID File-Permission Boundary Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: SUID 文件权限边界审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 SUID 文件权限边界审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for SUID File-Permission Boundary Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: SUID 文件权限边界审计聚焦以下边界：在限定系统目录列出 SUID 文件、所有者和哈希，并与批准基线比较，不使用 shell escape。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: SUID File-Permission Boundary Audit focuses on this boundary: Lists SUID files, owners, and hashes in bounded system directories and compares them with an approved baseline without using shell escapes. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 提权风险来自服务、文件、令牌、安装策略、内核或计划执行边界允许低权限主体影响高权限进程。版本匹配、权限存在或工具可运行只是前置条件，必须证明可控对象与高权限执行之间存在实际授权缺口。
vulnerability.en: Privilege-escalation risk arises when services, files, tokens, installer policy, kernel, or scheduled execution let a low-privilege principal influence a high-privilege process. Version match, privilege presence, or tool availability is only a prerequisite; an actual authorization gap between a controllable object and privileged execution must be shown.

prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Cron Ownership and Writable-Path Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Cron 所有权与可写路径审计聚焦以下边界：只检查固定 cron 文件和脚本的所有者、权限与路径，不创建 checkpoint 或执行命令。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Cron Ownership and Writable-Path Audit focuses on this boundary: Checks owner, permissions, and paths for fixed cron files and scripts without creating checkpoints or executing commands. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 提权风险来自服务、文件、令牌、安装策略、内核或计划执行边界允许低权限主体影响高权限进程。版本匹配、权限存在或工具可运行只是前置条件，必须证明可控对象与高权限执行之间存在实际授权缺口。
vulnerability.en: Privilege-escalation risk arises when services, files, tokens, installer policy, kernel, or scheduled execution let a low-privilege principal influence a high-privilege process. Version match, privilege presence, or tool availability is only a prerequisite; an actual authorization gap between a controllable object and privileged execution must be shown.

exploitation.zh: 在可回滚实验主机使用 PAYLOADER_PRIVESC 只读查询记录版本、补丁、ACL、所有者、服务账户和令牌权限，并与高权限基线对照。不修改服务、注册表、任务、SUID、sudoers 或进程，也不启动高权限 shell。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PRIVESC read-only queries on a reversible lab host to record version, patches, ACLs, owners, service accounts, and token privileges and compare them with a privileged baseline. Do not modify services, registry, tasks, SUID, sudoers, or processes and do not start a privileged shell. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 应用安全补丁，移除不必要的模拟/备份/调试权限，收紧服务和目录 ACL、sudoers、SUID、安装策略与计划任务，使用受保护服务账户和应用控制。监控高权限子进程、配置变更和异常令牌使用，并用同一查询回归。
mitigation.en: Apply security patches, remove unneeded impersonation, backup, and debug privileges, tighten service and directory ACLs, sudoers, SUID, installer policy, and scheduled tasks, and use protected service accounts plus application control. Monitor privileged child processes, configuration changes, and anomalous token use and replay the same queries.

title.zh: 确认 Cron 所有权与可写路径审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Cron Ownership and Writable-Path Audit

description.zh: 记录 Cron 所有权与可写路径审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Cron Ownership and Writable-Path Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 Cron 所有权与可写路径审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Cron Ownership and Writable-Path Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 Cron 所有权与可写路径审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Cron Ownership and Writable-Path Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 Cron 所有权与可写路径审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Cron Ownership and Writable-Path Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: Cron 所有权与可写路径审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Cron Ownership and Writable-Path Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 只检查固定 cron 文件和脚本的所有者、权限与路径，不创建 checkpoint 或执行命令。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: 注册表启动项持久化审计

description.zh: 注册表启动项持久化审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Registry Startup Persistence Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: 注册表启动项持久化审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 注册表启动项持久化审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Registry Startup Persistence Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: 注册表启动项持久化审计聚焦以下边界：只读取 Run、RunOnce 和 Winlogon 等批准位置并核对签名与基线，不写入注册表。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Registry Startup Persistence Audit focuses on this boundary: Reads approved Run, RunOnce, and Winlogon locations and compares signatures plus baseline without writing the registry. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 持久化风险来自启动项、服务、WMI、账号、票据或模块加载位置允许未批准对象在登录、启动或认证时持续生效。验证应读取配置与事件并和批准基线比较，而不是为了证明风险而创建后门。
vulnerability.en: Persistence risk arises when startup items, services, WMI, accounts, tickets, or module-load locations allow unapproved objects to remain effective at logon, startup, or authentication. Validation should read configuration and events and compare them with an approved baseline rather than creating a backdoor to prove risk.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE 只读查询收集对象名称、路径、签名、所有者、ACL、创建时间和审计事件，限制结果数量并与配置管理清单比较。不创建用户、服务、任务、注册表值、事件订阅或注入模块。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE read-only queries to collect object name, path, signature, owner, ACL, creation time, and audit event, limit result count, and compare with the configuration inventory. Do not create users, services, tasks, registry values, event subscriptions, or injected modules. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 移除未批准持久化对象，收紧启动位置、服务、WMI、计划任务、账号与目录 ACL，使用代码签名和应用控制，并为创建/修改事件建立告警。对域控实施分层管理、krbtgt 轮换与完整性监控，修复后重复只读基线。
mitigation.en: Remove unapproved persistence objects; tighten startup locations, services, WMI, scheduled tasks, accounts, and directory ACLs; enforce code signing and application control; and alert on create or modify events. Apply tiered administration, krbtgt rotation, and integrity monitoring to domain controllers and replay the read-only baseline.

title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Registry Startup Persistence Audit

name.zh: WMI 永久事件订阅审计

description.zh: WMI 永久事件订阅审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。

opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 只读取 root/subscription 中的过滤器、消费者和绑定并关联创建事件，不新建订阅。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: 启动文件夹持久化审计

description.zh: 启动文件夹持久化审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Startup-Folder Persistence Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: 启动文件夹持久化审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 启动文件夹持久化审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Startup-Folder Persistence Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: 启动文件夹持久化审计聚焦以下边界：列出用户与全局启动目录中的文件、签名和所有者，不复制快捷方式或程序。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Startup-Folder Persistence Audit focuses on this boundary: Lists files, signatures, and owners in user and global startup folders without copying shortcuts or programs. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 持久化风险来自启动项、服务、WMI、账号、票据或模块加载位置允许未批准对象在登录、启动或认证时持续生效。验证应读取配置与事件并和批准基线比较，而不是为了证明风险而创建后门。
vulnerability.en: Persistence risk arises when startup items, services, WMI, accounts, tickets, or module-load locations allow unapproved objects to remain effective at logon, startup, or authentication. Validation should read configuration and events and compare them with an approved baseline rather than creating a backdoor to prove risk.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE 只读查询收集对象名称、路径、签名、所有者、ACL、创建时间和审计事件，限制结果数量并与配置管理清单比较。不创建用户、服务、任务、注册表值、事件订阅或注入模块。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE read-only queries to collect object name, path, signature, owner, ACL, creation time, and audit event, limit result count, and compare with the configuration inventory. Do not create users, services, tasks, registry values, event subscriptions, or injected modules. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 移除未批准持久化对象，收紧启动位置、服务、WMI、计划任务、账号与目录 ACL，使用代码签名和应用控制，并为创建/修改事件建立告警。对域控实施分层管理、krbtgt 轮换与完整性监控，修复后重复只读基线。
mitigation.en: Remove unapproved persistence objects; tighten startup locations, services, WMI, scheduled tasks, accounts, and directory ACLs; enforce code signing and application control; and alert on create or modify events. Apply tiered administration, krbtgt rotation, and integrity monitoring to domain controllers and replay the read-only baseline.

title.zh: 确认 启动文件夹持久化审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Startup-Folder Persistence Audit

description.zh: 记录 启动文件夹持久化审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Startup-Folder Persistence Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 启动文件夹持久化审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Startup-Folder Persistence Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 启动文件夹持久化审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Startup-Folder Persistence Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 启动文件夹持久化审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Startup-Folder Persistence Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: 启动文件夹持久化审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Startup-Folder Persistence Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 列出用户与全局启动目录中的文件、签名和所有者，不复制快捷方式或程序。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: AppInit 与模块注入持久化审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: AppInit and Module-Injection Persistence Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 读取 AppInit_DLLs、签名策略和模块加载事件，不生成 DLL 或注入进程。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: 异常本地账号持久化审计

description.zh: 异常本地账号持久化审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Anomalous Local-Account Persistence Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: 异常本地账号持久化审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 异常本地账号持久化审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Anomalous Local-Account Persistence Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: 异常本地账号持久化审计聚焦以下边界：只列出本地账号、管理员组和最近账号事件，与批准清单比较，不创建用户。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Anomalous Local-Account Persistence Audit focuses on this boundary: Lists local accounts, Administrators membership, and recent account events for comparison with an approved list without creating a user. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 持久化风险来自启动项、服务、WMI、账号、票据或模块加载位置允许未批准对象在登录、启动或认证时持续生效。验证应读取配置与事件并和批准基线比较，而不是为了证明风险而创建后门。
vulnerability.en: Persistence risk arises when startup items, services, WMI, accounts, tickets, or module-load locations allow unapproved objects to remain effective at logon, startup, or authentication. Validation should read configuration and events and compare them with an approved baseline rather than creating a backdoor to prove risk.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE 只读查询收集对象名称、路径、签名、所有者、ACL、创建时间和审计事件，限制结果数量并与配置管理清单比较。不创建用户、服务、任务、注册表值、事件订阅或注入模块。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE read-only queries to collect object name, path, signature, owner, ACL, creation time, and audit event, limit result count, and compare with the configuration inventory. Do not create users, services, tasks, registry values, event subscriptions, or injected modules. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 移除未批准持久化对象，收紧启动位置、服务、WMI、计划任务、账号与目录 ACL，使用代码签名和应用控制，并为创建/修改事件建立告警。对域控实施分层管理、krbtgt 轮换与完整性监控，修复后重复只读基线。
mitigation.en: Remove unapproved persistence objects; tighten startup locations, services, WMI, scheduled tasks, accounts, and directory ACLs; enforce code signing and application control; and alert on create or modify events. Apply tiered administration, krbtgt rotation, and integrity monitoring to domain controllers and replay the read-only baseline.

title.zh: 确认 异常本地账号持久化审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Anomalous Local-Account Persistence Audit

description.zh: 记录 异常本地账号持久化审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Anomalous Local-Account Persistence Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 异常本地账号持久化审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Anomalous Local-Account Persistence Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 异常本地账号持久化审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Anomalous Local-Account Persistence Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 异常本地账号持久化审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Anomalous Local-Account Persistence Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。

title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Skeleton Key Domain-Controller Integrity Audit

description.zh: 记录 Skeleton Key 域控完整性审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Skeleton Key Domain-Controller Integrity Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 Skeleton Key 域控完整性审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Skeleton Key Domain-Controller Integrity Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 Skeleton Key 域控完整性审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Skeleton Key Domain-Controller Integrity Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 Skeleton Key 域控完整性审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Skeleton Key Domain-Controller Integrity Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: Skeleton Key 域控完整性审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Skeleton Key Domain-Controller Integrity Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对域控制器 LSASS 模块、签名和认证异常，不注入补丁或测试万能密码。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: DSRM 配置与登录行为审计

description.zh: DSRM 配置与登录行为审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: DSRM Configuration and Logon-Behavior Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: DSRM 配置与登录行为审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 DSRM 配置与登录行为审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for DSRM Configuration and Logon-Behavior Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: DSRM 配置与登录行为审计聚焦以下边界：只读取 DSRM 登录行为、相关策略和审计事件，不修改密码、注册表或使用哈希登录。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: DSRM Configuration and Logon-Behavior Audit focuses on this boundary: Reads DSRM logon behavior, related policy, and audit events without changing a password or registry value or logging on with a hash. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 持久化风险来自启动项、服务、WMI、账号、票据或模块加载位置允许未批准对象在登录、启动或认证时持续生效。验证应读取配置与事件并和批准基线比较，而不是为了证明风险而创建后门。
vulnerability.en: Persistence risk arises when startup items, services, WMI, accounts, tickets, or module-load locations allow unapproved objects to remain effective at logon, startup, or authentication. Validation should read configuration and events and compare them with an approved baseline rather than creating a backdoor to prove risk.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE 只读查询收集对象名称、路径、签名、所有者、ACL、创建时间和审计事件，限制结果数量并与配置管理清单比较。不创建用户、服务、任务、注册表值、事件订阅或注入模块。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE read-only queries to collect object name, path, signature, owner, ACL, creation time, and audit event, limit result count, and compare with the configuration inventory. Do not create users, services, tasks, registry values, event subscriptions, or injected modules. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 移除未批准持久化对象，收紧启动位置、服务、WMI、计划任务、账号与目录 ACL，使用代码签名和应用控制，并为创建/修改事件建立告警。对域控实施分层管理、krbtgt 轮换与完整性监控，修复后重复只读基线。
mitigation.en: Remove unapproved persistence objects; tighten startup locations, services, WMI, scheduled tasks, accounts, and directory ACLs; enforce code signing and application control; and alert on create or modify events. Apply tiered administration, krbtgt rotation, and integrity monitoring to domain controllers and replay the read-only baseline.

vulnerability.en: Persistence risk arises when startup items, services, WMI, accounts, tickets, or module-load locations allow unapproved objects to remain effective at logon, startup, or authentication. Validation should read configuration and events and compare them with an approved baseline rather than creating a backdoor to prove risk.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE 只读查询收集对象名称、路径、签名、所有者、ACL、创建时间和审计事件，限制结果数量并与配置管理清单比较。不创建用户、服务、任务、注册表值、事件订阅或注入模块。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_PERSISTENCE read-only queries to collect object name, path, signature, owner, ACL, creation time, and audit event, limit result count, and compare with the configuration inventory. Do not create users, services, tasks, registry values, event subscriptions, or injected modules. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 移除未批准持久化对象，收紧启动位置、服务、WMI、计划任务、账号与目录 ACL，使用代码签名和应用控制，并为创建/修改事件建立告警。对域控实施分层管理、krbtgt 轮换与完整性监控，修复后重复只读基线。
mitigation.en: Remove unapproved persistence objects; tighten startup locations, services, WMI, scheduled tasks, accounts, and directory ACLs; enforce code signing and application control; and alert on create or modify events. Apply tiered administration, krbtgt rotation, and integrity monitoring to domain controllers and replay the read-only baseline.

title.zh: 确认 进程镂空遥测与内存审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Process-Hollowing Telemetry and Memory Audit

description.zh: 记录 进程镂空遥测与内存审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Process-Hollowing Telemetry and Memory Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 进程镂空遥测与内存审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Process-Hollowing Telemetry and Memory Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 进程镂空遥测与内存审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Process-Hollowing Telemetry and Memory Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 进程镂空遥测与内存审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Process-Hollowing Telemetry and Memory Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: 进程镂空遥测与内存审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Process-Hollowing Telemetry and Memory Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 使用无害挂起进程夹具核对进程树、映像映射和 ETW 事件，不写入或恢复远程线程。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: AD 权限路径只读验证

description.zh: AD 权限路径只读验证保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: AD Privilege-Path Read-Only Validation preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: AD 权限路径只读验证

prerequisites.zh: 确认 AD 权限路径只读验证 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for AD Privilege-Path Read-Only Validation are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: AD 权限路径只读验证聚焦以下边界：使用有界图查询和 ACL 读取确认实验主体到高权限组的路径，不写 DACL、改密码或执行 DCSync。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: AD Privilege-Path Read-Only Validation focuses on this boundary: Uses bounded graph queries and ACL reads to validate a lab principal path to privileged groups without writing DACLs, changing passwords, or performing DCSync. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 域风险来自复制、委派、信任、票据、组策略、机器账号或协议补丁边界过宽。有效结论必须绑定精确域、对象、权限、补丁和事件，不能把可读取目录、工具输出或旧 CVE 名称直接拼成通用域管链。
vulnerability.en: Domain risk arises when replication, delegation, trust, ticket, Group Policy, machine-account, or protocol patch boundaries are overly broad. A valid result binds the exact domain, object, permission, patch, and event and does not combine readable directory data, tool output, or old CVE names into a universal domain-admin chain.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_DOMAIN 对单一实验对象执行有界只读查询，保存 DN、SID、权限 GUID、补丁、协议设置和事件 ID，并与权威目录/补丁基线核对。不写目录属性、改密码、注册域控、复制秘密、请求或注入票据。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_DOMAIN bounded read-only queries for one lab object, preserving DN, SID, permission GUID, patch, protocol setting, and event ID and comparing them with authoritative directory and patch baselines. Do not write directory attributes, change passwords, register controllers, replicate secrets, or request or inject tickets. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理和最小目录权限，收紧复制/委派/GPO/机器账号与信任配置，部署供应商补丁与强制模式，使用现代 Kerberos 加密、SMB/LDAP 签名和 EPA。监控敏感属性、复制、票据、机器重命名和域控注册事件。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration and least directory privilege; tighten replication, delegation, GPO, machine-account, and trust configuration; deploy vendor patches and enforcement modes; use modern Kerberos encryption, SMB and LDAP signing, and EPA; and monitor sensitive attributes, replication, tickets, machine renames, and controller registration.

title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for AD Privilege-Path Read-Only Validation

description.zh: AD 跨域信任配置审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。

prerequisites.zh: 确认 DCSync 复制权限审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for DCSync Replication-Permission Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: DCSync 复制权限审计聚焦以下边界：核对指定实验主体的目录复制扩展权限和 4662 事件，不复制账号秘密。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: DCSync Replication-Permission Audit focuses on this boundary: Reviews directory-replication extended rights and event 4662 for one lab principal without replicating account secrets. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 域风险来自复制、委派、信任、票据、组策略、机器账号或协议补丁边界过宽。有效结论必须绑定精确域、对象、权限、补丁和事件，不能把可读取目录、工具输出或旧 CVE 名称直接拼成通用域管链。
vulnerability.en: Domain risk arises when replication, delegation, trust, ticket, Group Policy, machine-account, or protocol patch boundaries are overly broad. A valid result binds the exact domain, object, permission, patch, and event and does not combine readable directory data, tool output, or old CVE names into a universal domain-admin chain.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_DOMAIN 对单一实验对象执行有界只读查询，保存 DN、SID、权限 GUID、补丁、协议设置和事件 ID，并与权威目录/补丁基线核对。不写目录属性、改密码、注册域控、复制秘密、请求或注入票据。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_DOMAIN bounded read-only queries for one lab object, preserving DN, SID, permission GUID, patch, protocol setting, and event ID and comparing them with authoritative directory and patch baselines. Do not write directory attributes, change passwords, register controllers, replicate secrets, or request or inject tickets. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理和最小目录权限，收紧复制/委派/GPO/机器账号与信任配置，部署供应商补丁与强制模式，使用现代 Kerberos 加密、SMB/LDAP 签名和 EPA。监控敏感属性、复制、票据、机器重命名和域控注册事件。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration and least directory privilege; tighten replication, delegation, GPO, machine-account, and trust configuration; deploy vendor patches and enforcement modes; use modern Kerberos encryption, SMB and LDAP signing, and EPA; and monitor sensitive attributes, replication, tickets, machine renames, and controller registration.

title.zh: 确认 DCSync 复制权限审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for DCSync Replication-Permission Audit

description.zh: 记录 DCSync 复制权限审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for DCSync Replication-Permission Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 DCSync 复制权限审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed DCSync Replication-Permission Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 DCSync 复制权限审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for DCSync Replication-Permission Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 DCSync 复制权限审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the DCSync Replication-Permission Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: DCSync 复制权限审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: DCSync Replication-Permission Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对指定实验主体的目录复制扩展权限和 4662 事件，不复制账号秘密。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: 黄金票据前置条件与检测审计

description.zh: 黄金票据前置条件与检测审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Golden-Ticket Preconditions and Detection Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: 黄金票据前置条件与检测审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 黄金票据前置条件与检测审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 使用合成服务票据核对 SPN、服务账号轮换和日志差异，不提取服务密钥或注入票据。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计
name.en: Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit

description.zh: Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计
subCategory.en: Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计聚焦以下边界：只核对实验域控制器版本、补丁、安全通道事件和强制模式，不重置机器账号密码。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit focuses on this boundary: Reviews lab domain-controller version, patches, secure-channel events, and enforcement mode without resetting a machine-account password. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 域风险来自复制、委派、信任、票据、组策略、机器账号或协议补丁边界过宽。有效结论必须绑定精确域、对象、权限、补丁和事件，不能把可读取目录、工具输出或旧 CVE 名称直接拼成通用域管链。
vulnerability.en: Domain risk arises when replication, delegation, trust, ticket, Group Policy, machine-account, or protocol patch boundaries are overly broad. A valid result binds the exact domain, object, permission, patch, and event and does not combine readable directory data, tool output, or old CVE names into a universal domain-admin chain.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_DOMAIN 对单一实验对象执行有界只读查询，保存 DN、SID、权限 GUID、补丁、协议设置和事件 ID，并与权威目录/补丁基线核对。不写目录属性、改密码、注册域控、复制秘密、请求或注入票据。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_DOMAIN bounded read-only queries for one lab object, preserving DN, SID, permission GUID, patch, protocol setting, and event ID and comparing them with authoritative directory and patch baselines. Do not write directory attributes, change passwords, register controllers, replicate secrets, or request or inject tickets. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理和最小目录权限，收紧复制/委派/GPO/机器账号与信任配置，部署供应商补丁与强制模式，使用现代 Kerberos 加密、SMB/LDAP 签名和 EPA。监控敏感属性、复制、票据、机器重命名和域控注册事件。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration and least directory privilege; tighten replication, delegation, GPO, machine-account, and trust configuration; deploy vendor patches and enforcement modes; use modern Kerberos encryption, SMB and LDAP signing, and EPA; and monitor sensitive attributes, replication, tickets, machine renames, and controller registration.

title.zh: 确认 Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit

description.zh: 记录 Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Zerologon Patch and Protocol Configuration Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: Zerologon 补丁与协议配置审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。

An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 只核对实验域控制器版本、补丁、安全通道事件和强制模式，不重置机器账号密码。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

title.zh: 运行一条 PetitPotam/EFSRPC 暴露审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed PetitPotam and EFSRPC Exposure Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 PetitPotam/EFSRPC 暴露审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for PetitPotam and EFSRPC Exposure Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 PetitPotam/EFSRPC 暴露审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the PetitPotam and EFSRPC Exposure Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: PetitPotam/EFSRPC 暴露审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: PetitPotam and EFSRPC Exposure Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对 EFSRPC 可达性、NTLM 限制、AD CS EPA 和相关事件，不强制域控认证或中继。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: sAMAccountName/PAC 补丁边界审计

description.zh: sAMAccountName/PAC 补丁边界审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: sAMAccountName and PAC Patch-Boundary Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: sAMAccountName/PAC 补丁边界审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 sAMAccountName/PAC 补丁边界审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for sAMAccountName and PAC Patch-Boundary Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: sAMAccountName/PAC 补丁边界审计聚焦以下边界：核对 CVE-2021-42278/42287 补丁、机器账号配额和异常重命名事件，不创建机器账号或请求冒充票据。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: sAMAccountName and PAC Patch-Boundary Audit focuses on this boundary: Reviews CVE-2021-42278 and CVE-2021-42287 patches, machine-account quota, and anomalous rename events without creating an account or requesting an impersonation ticket. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 域风险来自复制、委派、信任、票据、组策略、机器账号或协议补丁边界过宽。有效结论必须绑定精确域、对象、权限、补丁和事件，不能把可读取目录、工具输出或旧 CVE 名称直接拼成通用域管链。
vulnerability.en: Domain risk arises when replication, delegation, trust, ticket, Group Policy, machine-account, or protocol patch boundaries are overly broad. A valid result binds the exact domain, object, permission, patch, and event and does not combine readable directory data, tool output, or old CVE names into a universal domain-admin chain.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_DOMAIN 对单一实验对象执行有界只读查询，保存 DN、SID、权限 GUID、补丁、协议设置和事件 ID，并与权威目录/补丁基线核对。不写目录属性、改密码、注册域控、复制秘密、请求或注入票据。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_DOMAIN bounded read-only queries for one lab object, preserving DN, SID, permission GUID, patch, protocol setting, and event ID and comparing them with authoritative directory and patch baselines. Do not write directory attributes, change passwords, register controllers, replicate secrets, or request or inject tickets. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理和最小目录权限，收紧复制/委派/GPO/机器账号与信任配置，部署供应商补丁与强制模式，使用现代 Kerberos 加密、SMB/LDAP 签名和 EPA。监控敏感属性、复制、票据、机器重命名和域控注册事件。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration and least directory privilege; tighten replication, delegation, GPO, machine-account, and trust configuration; deploy vendor patches and enforcement modes; use modern Kerberos encryption, SMB and LDAP signing, and EPA; and monitor sensitive attributes, replication, tickets, machine renames, and controller registration.

title.zh: 确认 sAMAccountName/PAC 补丁边界审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for sAMAccountName and PAC Patch-Boundary Audit

description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for sAMAccountName and PAC Patch-Boundary Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

vulnerability.zh: 域风险来自复制、委派、信任、票据、组策略、机器账号或协议补丁边界过宽。有效结论必须绑定精确域、对象、权限、补丁和事件，不能把可读取目录、工具输出或旧 CVE 名称直接拼成通用域管链。
vulnerability.en: Domain risk arises when replication, delegation, trust, ticket, Group Policy, machine-account, or protocol patch boundaries are overly broad. A valid result binds the exact domain, object, permission, patch, and event and does not combine readable directory data, tool output, or old CVE names into a universal domain-admin chain.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_DOMAIN 对单一实验对象执行有界只读查询，保存 DN、SID、权限 GUID、补丁、协议设置和事件 ID，并与权威目录/补丁基线核对。不写目录属性、改密码、注册域控、复制秘密、请求或注入票据。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_DOMAIN bounded read-only queries for one lab object, preserving DN, SID, permission GUID, patch, protocol setting, and event ID and comparing them with authoritative directory and patch baselines. Do not write directory attributes, change passwords, register controllers, replicate secrets, or request or inject tickets. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理和最小目录权限，收紧复制/委派/GPO/机器账号与信任配置，部署供应商补丁与强制模式，使用现代 Kerberos 加密、SMB/LDAP 签名和 EPA。监控敏感属性、复制、票据、机器重命名和域控注册事件。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration and least directory privilege; tighten replication, delegation, GPO, machine-account, and trust configuration; deploy vendor patches and enforcement modes; use modern Kerberos encryption, SMB and LDAP signing, and EPA; and monitor sensitive attributes, replication, tickets, machine renames, and controller registration.

title.zh: 确认 DCShadow 复制元数据检测审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for DCShadow Replication-Metadata Detection Audit

description.zh: 记录 DCShadow 复制元数据检测审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for DCShadow Replication-Metadata Detection Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 DCShadow 复制元数据检测审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed DCShadow Replication-Metadata Detection Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 DCShadow 复制元数据检测审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for DCShadow Replication-Metadata Detection Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 DCShadow 复制元数据检测审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the DCShadow Replication-Metadata Detection Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: DCShadow 复制元数据检测审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: DCShadow Replication-Metadata Detection Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对授权域控制器清单、复制拓扑和异常目录变更事件，不注册伪造 DC 或推送属性。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: 组策略编辑权限与变更审计

description.zh: 组策略编辑权限与变更审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Group-Policy Edit-Permission and Change Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: 组策略编辑权限与变更审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 组策略编辑权限与变更审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Group-Policy Edit-Permission and Change Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: 组策略编辑权限与变更审计聚焦以下边界：读取有界 GPO ACL、版本与变更事件，不创建任务、写注册表首选项或修改 GPO。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Group-Policy Edit-Permission and Change Audit focuses on this boundary: Reads bounded GPO ACLs, versions, and change events without creating tasks, writing registry preferences, or modifying a GPO. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.
