name.zh: Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计
name.en: Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit

description.zh: Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计
subCategory.en: Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计聚焦以下边界：绑定具体实现、CVE 与加密套件后核对补丁和票据事件，不获取 TGT 或设置凭据缓存。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit focuses on this boundary: Binds the check to a specific implementation, CVE, and cipher suite before reviewing patches and ticket events without obtaining a TGT or setting a credential cache. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 域风险来自复制、委派、信任、票据、组策略、机器账号或协议补丁边界过宽。有效结论必须绑定精确域、对象、权限、补丁和事件，不能把可读取目录、工具输出或旧 CVE 名称直接拼成通用域管链。
vulnerability.en: Domain risk arises when replication, delegation, trust, ticket, Group Policy, machine-account, or protocol patch boundaries are overly broad. A valid result binds the exact domain, object, permission, patch, and event and does not combine readable directory data, tool output, or old CVE names into a universal domain-admin chain.

exploitation.zh: 使用 PAYLOADER_DOMAIN 对单一实验对象执行有界只读查询，保存 DN、SID、权限 GUID、补丁、协议设置和事件 ID，并与权威目录/补丁基线核对。不写目录属性、改密码、注册域控、复制秘密、请求或注入票据。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Use PAYLOADER_DOMAIN bounded read-only queries for one lab object, preserving DN, SID, permission GUID, patch, protocol setting, and event ID and comparing them with authoritative directory and patch baselines. Do not write directory attributes, change passwords, register controllers, replicate secrets, or request or inject tickets. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 实施分层管理和最小目录权限，收紧复制/委派/GPO/机器账号与信任配置，部署供应商补丁与强制模式，使用现代 Kerberos 加密、SMB/LDAP 签名和 EPA。监控敏感属性、复制、票据、机器重命名和域控注册事件。
mitigation.en: Apply tiered administration and least directory privilege; tighten replication, delegation, GPO, machine-account, and trust configuration; deploy vendor patches and enforcement modes; use modern Kerberos encryption, SMB and LDAP signing, and EPA; and monitor sensitive attributes, replication, tickets, machine renames, and controller registration.

title.zh: 确认 Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit

description.zh: 记录 Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: Kerberos NoAuth 版本与加密边界审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Kerberos NoAuth Version and Encryption-Boundary Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 绑定具体实现、CVE 与加密套件后核对补丁和票据事件，不获取 TGT 或设置凭据缓存。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: PowerShell 编码与脚本遥测审计

description.zh: PowerShell 编码与脚本遥测审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: PowerShell Encoding and Script-Telemetry Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

category.zh: 终端防护与遥测完整性

subCategory.zh: PowerShell 编码与脚本遥测审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 PowerShell 编码与脚本遥测审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for PowerShell Encoding and Script-Telemetry Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: PowerShell 编码与脚本遥测审计聚焦以下边界：使用本地无害编码标记核对 Script Block、AMSI 和进程命令行日志，不下载或隐藏执行。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: PowerShell Encoding and Script-Telemetry Audit focuses on this boundary: Uses a local harmless encoded marker to review Script Block, AMSI, and process command-line logs without downloading or hiding execution. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 终端风险来自脚本扫描、AMSI、ETW、模块签名、进程与命令行遥测之间存在盲区或完整性被破坏。验证目标是证明无害行为是否被稳定观测以及策略是否生效，不应通过关闭、patch 或规避安全控制来测试。
vulnerability.en: Endpoint risk arises from gaps or integrity failures across script scanning, AMSI, ETW, module signing, process, and command-line telemetry. Validation should prove whether harmless behavior is consistently observed and policy enforced, not test by disabling, patching, or evading security controls.

exploitation.zh: 运行一个本地签名或不可执行 PAYLOADER_EVASION 夹具，记录进程、脚本块、AMSI、ETW、模块加载与安全产品事件并对齐时间戳。只读取策略、签名、哈希和事件，不下载代码、修改内存、隐藏参数或执行 shellcode。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run one local signed or non-executable PAYLOADER_EVASION fixture and align process, script-block, AMSI, ETW, module-load, and security-product events by timestamp. Read only policy, signatures, hashes, and events; do not download code, modify memory, hide arguments, or execute shellcode. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 启用并集中收集 PowerShell、AMSI、ETW、进程创建和模块加载遥测，实施应用控制、代码签名、受保护进程和防篡改，限制调试/注入权限并更新检测规则。对遥测中断、未签名模块、异常父子关系和内存映像建立告警。
mitigation.en: Enable and centralize PowerShell, AMSI, ETW, process-creation, and module-load telemetry; enforce application control, code signing, protected processes, and tamper protection; restrict debug and injection rights; update detections; and alert on telemetry gaps, unsigned modules, anomalous parent-child relationships, and memory images.

title.zh: 确认 PowerShell 编码与脚本遥测审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for PowerShell Encoding and Script-Telemetry Audit

An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 AMSI 完整性与事件审计 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the AMSI Integrity and Event Audit Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: AMSI 完整性与事件审计只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: AMSI Integrity and Event Audit is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对 AMSI 提供程序、PowerShell 事件和模块签名，不反射修改 AmsiUtils 或替换 amsi.dll。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: ETW 提供程序完整性审计

description.zh: ETW 提供程序完整性审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: ETW Provider Integrity Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

category.zh: 终端防护与遥测完整性

subCategory.zh: ETW 提供程序完整性审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 ETW 提供程序完整性审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for ETW Provider Integrity Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: ETW 提供程序完整性审计聚焦以下边界：核对 ETW 提供程序注册、事件连续性和内存保护，不 patch EtwEventWrite。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: ETW Provider Integrity Audit focuses on this boundary: Reviews ETW provider registration, event continuity, and memory protections without patching EtwEventWrite. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 终端风险来自脚本扫描、AMSI、ETW、模块签名、进程与命令行遥测之间存在盲区或完整性被破坏。验证目标是证明无害行为是否被稳定观测以及策略是否生效，不应通过关闭、patch 或规避安全控制来测试。
vulnerability.en: Endpoint risk arises from gaps or integrity failures across script scanning, AMSI, ETW, module signing, process, and command-line telemetry. Validation should prove whether harmless behavior is consistently observed and policy enforced, not test by disabling, patching, or evading security controls.

exploitation.zh: 运行一个本地签名或不可执行 PAYLOADER_EVASION 夹具，记录进程、脚本块、AMSI、ETW、模块加载与安全产品事件并对齐时间戳。只读取策略、签名、哈希和事件，不下载代码、修改内存、隐藏参数或执行 shellcode。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run one local signed or non-executable PAYLOADER_EVASION fixture and align process, script-block, AMSI, ETW, module-load, and security-product events by timestamp. Read only policy, signatures, hashes, and events; do not download code, modify memory, hide arguments, or execute shellcode. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 启用并集中收集 PowerShell、AMSI、ETW、进程创建和模块加载遥测，实施应用控制、代码签名、受保护进程和防篡改，限制调试/注入权限并更新检测规则。对遥测中断、未签名模块、异常父子关系和内存映像建立告警。
mitigation.en: Enable and centralize PowerShell, AMSI, ETW, process-creation, and module-load telemetry; enforce application control, code signing, protected processes, and tamper protection; restrict debug and injection rights; update detections; and alert on telemetry gaps, unsigned modules, anomalous parent-child relationships, and memory images.

title.zh: 确认 ETW 提供程序完整性审计 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for ETW Provider Integrity Audit

description.zh: 记录 ETW 提供程序完整性审计 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for ETW Provider Integrity Audit and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 ETW 提供程序完整性审计 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed ETW Provider Integrity Audit Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 ETW 提供程序完整性审计 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for ETW Provider Integrity Audit

subCategory.zh: 进程模块签名策略审计

Read only policy, signatures, hashes, and events; do not download code, modify memory, hide arguments, or execute shellcode. mitigation.zh: 启用并集中收集 PowerShell、AMSI、ETW、进程创建和模块加载遥测，实施应用控制、代码签名、受保护进程和防篡改，限制调试/注入权限并更新检测规则。对遥测中断、未签名模块、异常父子关系和内存映像建立告警。
mitigation.en: Enable and centralize PowerShell, AMSI, ETW, process-creation, and module-load telemetry; enforce application control, code signing, protected processes, and tamper protection; restrict debug and injection rights; update detections; and alert on telemetry gaps, unsigned modules, anomalous parent-child relationships, and memory images.

title.zh: 确认 编码内存载荷检测回归 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Encoded In-Memory Payload Detection Regression

description.zh: 记录 编码内存载荷检测回归 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Encoded In-Memory Payload Detection Regression and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 编码内存载荷检测回归 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Encoded In-Memory Payload Detection Regression Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 编码内存载荷检测回归 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Encoded In-Memory Payload Detection Regression

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 编码内存载荷检测回归 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Encoded In-Memory Payload Detection Regression Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: 编码内存载荷检测回归只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Encoded In-Memory Payload Detection Regression is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 只对不可执行字节夹具计算熵、哈希和静态规则结果，不解密或运行 shellcode。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: 进程映像与命令行一致性审计
name.en: Process Image and Command-Line Consistency Audit

description.zh: 进程映像与命令行一致性审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Process Image and Command-Line Consistency Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

category.zh: 终端防护与遥测完整性

subCategory.zh: 进程映像与命令行一致性审计
subCategory.en: Process Image and Command-Line Consistency Audit

prerequisites.zh: 确认 进程映像与命令行一致性审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Process Image and Command-Line Consistency Audit are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: 进程映像与命令行一致性审计聚焦以下边界：关联进程映像路径、签名、父进程和命令行遥测，不创建挂起或伪装进程。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Process Image and Command-Line Consistency Audit focuses on this boundary: Correlates process image path, signature, parent, and command-line telemetry without creating a suspended or masqueraded process. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 终端风险来自脚本扫描、AMSI、ETW、模块签名、进程与命令行遥测之间存在盲区或完整性被破坏。验证目标是证明无害行为是否被稳定观测以及策略是否生效，不应通过关闭、patch 或规避安全控制来测试。
vulnerability.en: Endpoint risk arises from gaps or integrity failures across script scanning, AMSI, ETW, module signing, process, and command-line telemetry. Validation should prove whether harmless behavior is consistently observed and policy enforced, not test by disabling, patching, or evading security controls.

exploitation.zh: 运行一个本地签名或不可执行 PAYLOADER_EVASION 夹具，记录进程、脚本块、AMSI、ETW、模块加载与安全产品事件并对齐时间戳。只读取策略、签名、哈希和事件，不下载代码、修改内存、隐藏参数或执行 shellcode。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run one local signed or non-executable PAYLOADER_EVASION fixture and align process, script-block, AMSI, ETW, module-load, and security-product events by timestamp. Read only policy, signatures, hashes, and events; do not download code, modify memory, hide arguments, or execute shellcode. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 启用并集中收集 PowerShell、AMSI、ETW、进程创建和模块加载遥测，实施应用控制、代码签名、受保护进程和防篡改，限制调试/注入权限并更新检测规则。对遥测中断、未签名模块、异常父子关系和内存映像建立告警。
mitigation.en: Enable and centralize PowerShell, AMSI, ETW, process-creation, and module-load telemetry; enforce application control, code signing, protected processes, and tamper protection; restrict debug and injection rights; update detections; and alert on telemetry gaps, unsigned modules, anomalous parent-child relationships, and memory images.

prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for DLL Sideloading Search-Order Detection are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: DLL 侧加载搜索顺序检测聚焦以下边界：使用签名应用和不可执行标记 DLL 核对加载路径、签名与目录 ACL，不构建代理 DLL。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: DLL Sideloading Search-Order Detection focuses on this boundary: Uses a signed application and non-executable marker DLL to review load path, signature, and directory ACL without building a proxy DLL. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 终端风险来自脚本扫描、AMSI、ETW、模块签名、进程与命令行遥测之间存在盲区或完整性被破坏。验证目标是证明无害行为是否被稳定观测以及策略是否生效，不应通过关闭、patch 或规避安全控制来测试。
vulnerability.en: Endpoint risk arises from gaps or integrity failures across script scanning, AMSI, ETW, module signing, process, and command-line telemetry. Validation should prove whether harmless behavior is consistently observed and policy enforced, not test by disabling, patching, or evading security controls.

exploitation.zh: 运行一个本地签名或不可执行 PAYLOADER_EVASION 夹具，记录进程、脚本块、AMSI、ETW、模块加载与安全产品事件并对齐时间戳。只读取策略、签名、哈希和事件，不下载代码、修改内存、隐藏参数或执行 shellcode。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run one local signed or non-executable PAYLOADER_EVASION fixture and align process, script-block, AMSI, ETW, module-load, and security-product events by timestamp. Read only policy, signatures, hashes, and events; do not download code, modify memory, hide arguments, or execute shellcode. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 启用并集中收集 PowerShell、AMSI、ETW、进程创建和模块加载遥测，实施应用控制、代码签名、受保护进程和防篡改，限制调试/注入权限并更新检测规则。对遥测中断、未签名模块、异常父子关系和内存映像建立告警。
mitigation.en: Enable and centralize PowerShell, AMSI, ETW, process-creation, and module-load telemetry; enforce application control, code signing, protected processes, and tamper protection; restrict debug and injection rights; update detections; and alert on telemetry gaps, unsigned modules, anomalous parent-child relationships, and memory images.

title.zh: 确认 DLL 侧加载搜索顺序检测 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for DLL Sideloading Search-Order Detection

description.zh: 记录 DLL 侧加载搜索顺序检测 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for DLL Sideloading Search-Order Detection and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 DLL 侧加载搜索顺序检测 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed DLL Sideloading Search-Order Detection Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 DLL 侧加载搜索顺序检测 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for DLL Sideloading Search-Order Detection

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 DLL 侧加载搜索顺序检测 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the DLL Sideloading Search-Order Detection Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: DLL 侧加载搜索顺序检测只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: DLL Sideloading Search-Order Detection is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 使用签名应用和不可执行标记 DLL 核对加载路径、签名与目录 ACL，不构建代理 DLL。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: 进程参数多源遥测审计

description.zh: 进程参数多源遥测审计保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Process-Argument Multi-Source Telemetry Audit preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

category.zh: 终端防护与遥测完整性

subCategory.zh: 进程参数多源遥测审计

prerequisites.zh: 确认 进程参数多源遥测审计 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。

opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 使用签名无害程序集核对 CLR Runtime、程序集加载和进程事件，不在其他进程内加载代码。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

name.zh: Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归

description.zh: Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归保留原始可复现技术命令，并将执行范围限定在书面授权、可回滚的隔离实验环境；仅修复明显占位符、纯叙述行和不可执行片段，同时要求关联身份、主机、目录、网络和安全产品证据。
description.en: Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression preserves the original reproducible technique commands while restricting execution to a written, reversible, isolated lab authorization. Only obvious placeholders, narrative-only lines, and non-executable fragments are repaired, with identity, host, directory, network, and security-product evidence required.

subCategory.zh: Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归 的实验域、主机、账号、组件版本和停止条件已书面授权且可回滚。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the lab domain, host, account, component version, and stop conditions for Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression are authorized in writing and reversible.

prerequisites.zh: 准备正常基线、合成对象、唯一标记、回滚快照以及身份、系统和网络日志；任何写入、远程执行或凭据操作都必须属于当前隔离实验授权。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a normal baseline, synthetic object, unique marker, rollback snapshot, and identity, system, and network logs; every write, remote execution, or credential action must be within the current isolated-lab authorization.

overview.zh: Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归聚焦以下边界：核对 Exchange 精确版本、补丁、前端/后端路由与无会话响应，不运行利用脚本。 审校后保留原始技术能力，并按实验授权、执行前提、蓝队证据和修复回归组织内容，避免把工具成功、管理员权限或旧版利用结果直接当作普遍漏洞。
overview.en: Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression focuses on this boundary: Reviews exact Exchange version, patches, front-end and backend routing, and no-session responses without running an exploit script. The reviewed entry preserves the original technical capability and organizes it around lab authorization, execution prerequisites, blue-team evidence, and remediation regression so tool success, administrator access, or old exploit results are not treated as universal vulnerabilities.

vulnerability.zh: Exchange 风险必须绑定精确产品版本、累积更新、安全更新、启用角色和前后端路由。公开端点、HTTP 状态或产品名称不能证明 ProxyLogon、ProxyShell 或 ProxyToken；必须有补丁前置条件和服务端授权差异。
vulnerability.en: Exchange risk must bind the exact product version, cumulative update, security update, enabled role, and front-end or backend routing. A public endpoint, HTTP status, or product name does not prove ProxyLogon, ProxyShell, or ProxyToken; patch prerequisites and a server-side authorization difference are required.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离 Exchange 实验环境运行 PAYLOADER_EXCHANGE 版本、补丁、端点和无会话响应查询，保存 AdminDisplayVersion、更新清单、IIS/Exchange 日志与请求 ID。不访问邮箱、导出 PST、伪造头、写 WebShell 或执行利用脚本。 原始技术命令仅在隔离实验环境按单条、单目标执行，并同步保存蓝队证据（目标端事件、网络流量和安全产品告警）以证明能力与检测覆盖。
exploitation.en: Run PAYLOADER_EXCHANGE version, patch, endpoint, and no-session response queries in an isolated Exchange lab, preserving AdminDisplayVersion, update inventory, IIS and Exchange logs, and request IDs. Do not access mailboxes, export PST, forge headers, write web shells, or run exploit scripts. Run retained technique commands one at a time against one target in an isolated lab, preserving blue-team evidence such as target-side events, network traffic, and security-product alerts to prove both capability and detection coverage.

mitigation.zh: 升级到受支持的 Exchange CU 并安装最新安全更新，运行供应商健康检查，限制管理端点与 ECP/PowerShell 暴露，强化 EPA、身份与反向代理规则。对异常 Autodiscover、EWS、MAPI、PowerShell 和邮箱权限变更建立审计。
mitigation.en: Upgrade to a supported Exchange CU and current security update, run vendor health checks, restrict management endpoints and ECP or PowerShell exposure, and strengthen EPA, identity, and reverse-proxy rules. Audit anomalous Autodiscover, EWS, MAPI, PowerShell, and mailbox-permission changes.

title.zh: 确认 Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归 的版本与授权边界
title.en: Confirm Version and Authorization for Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression

description.zh: 记录 Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归 的实验对象、执行主体、系统或域版本、补丁、正常配置和停止条件，确认真实前置条件。
description.en: Record the lab object, execution principal, system or domain version, patches, normal configuration, and stop conditions for Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression and confirm the actual prerequisites.

title.zh: 运行一条 Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归 已审查命令
title.en: Run One Reviewed Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression Command

description.zh: 在隔离实验中只运行第一条已审查命令，保存原始输出、时间戳、目标端日志和回滚状态；涉及写入或远程动作时严格遵守单目标授权。
description.en: Run only the first reviewed command in the isolated lab, preserving raw output, timestamps, target-side logs, and rollback state; any write or remote action must stay within the one-target authorization.

title.zh: 关联 Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归 的控制面证据
title.en: Correlate Control-Plane Evidence for Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression

description.zh: 把唯一标记与身份、目录、系统、网络或安全产品事件对齐，并排除管理员正常能力、工具输出、缓存和版本不匹配。
description.en: Align the unique marker with identity, directory, system, network, or security-product events and exclude normal administrator capability, tool output, caching, and version mismatch.

title.zh: 修复 Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate the Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: Exchange ProxyLogon 补丁回归只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Exchange ProxyLogon Patch Regression is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对 Exchange 精确版本、补丁、前端/后端路由与无会话响应，不运行利用脚本。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。

title.en: Remediate the Exchange ProxyToken Authorization Regression Boundary and Regress

description.zh: 应用最小权限、补丁或配置修复后重复正常与只读标记查询，确认管理功能保留且非预期权限、可见性或遥测缺口消失。
description.en: Apply least privilege, a patch, or configuration remediation and repeat the normal and read-only marker queries to preserve administration while removing unintended privilege, visibility, or telemetry gaps.

analysis.zh: Exchange ProxyToken 授权回归只有在精确版本与对象、当前主体、已审查命令输出、权威配置和服务端日志相互一致时才能确认。端口开放、工具成功、权限名称存在、状态码或单一事件只能作为线索；能力证明与漏洞结论必须分别记录。
analysis.en: Exchange ProxyToken Authorization Regression is confirmed only when the exact version and object, current principal, reviewed command output, authoritative configuration, and server-side logs agree. An open port, successful tool run, privilege name, status code, or single event is only a lead; capability proof and vulnerability conclusion must be recorded separately.

opsecTips.zh: 一次只查询一个实验对象并限制结果数量，不保存凭据、哈希、票据、邮箱正文或无关个人数据。
opsecTips.en: Query one lab object at a time with bounded results and do not retain credentials, hashes, tickets, mailbox content, or unrelated personal data.

opsecTips.zh: 发现超出授权的写操作、远程进程、账号变更、防护中断或非实验目标时立即停止，执行回滚并保存审计时间点。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately, roll back, and preserve the audit timestamp on any write, remote process, account change, protection gap, or non-lab target outside the authorization.

review.rationale: 核对精确版本、补丁和前后端授权响应，不伪造 X-ClientApplication 或授予邮箱权限。 该条目保留为具体技术验证卡，保留可复现攻击能力，仅修复不可执行叙述和明显占位符，并补充隔离授权、回滚和蓝队证据要求。
